tasks.subject: Task 1: ConnectedAccountsView (/connected)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** List linked identities, unlink (sudo + confirm), link a provider (proactive sudo → hardRedirect).

**Files:** dashboard/src/pages/ConnectedAccountsView.vue (create), ConnectedAccountsView.test.ts (create), dashboard/src/locales/en.ts (modify: connected: block + errors.last_sign_in_method, credential_not_found)

```json:metadata
{"files": ["dashboard/src/pages/ConnectedAccountsView.vue", "dashboard/src/pages/ConnectedAccountsView.test.ts", "dashboard/src/locales/en.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd dashboard && mise exec -- npm run test -- ConnectedAccountsView", "acceptanceCriteria": ["lists identities", "empty state", "unlink via withSudo + ConfirmDialog refreshes", "link disables linked slugs + ensureSudo then hardRedirect"]}
```
